feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I deploy Fiori App with POST API call function to Cloud Public edition with excel uploading?
entry.content:
Hello, I'm RAP/Fiori developer and there some errors occur about API calling.

I need to develop Fiori app that uploads datum from excel file and create manufacturing order, using the datum from excel file.But the ways I chose have problems.

 

API call from Fiori freestyle project succeeded when the API information registered in manifest.json, but ended with deploy error.(abap-deploy)

 

If the Fiori project includes sap standard API uri in API call logic, call POST API ended with 403 authrization error.

 

I don't know if this works require the BTP destination, though I don't use SAP Build Wok Zone nor HTML5 Repository. Is the BTP destination required when call SAP standard APIs from Fiori project, and is it possible to deploy by abap-deploy method?

 

How can I deploy Fiori App with POST API call function to Cloud Public edition? Should I use BTP destination? Or Should I use RAP action? If the RAP action needed, can you show me the use case or logic examples? Or createing Business Object from Custom Business Object app in Cloud Public Edition needed?

 

It's the first time to develop and deploy in Cloud Public Edition environment, using Fiori project with POST API call. If you suggest some possible solutions in detail, it will be very helpful to succeed the project. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Separate authorization for park and post supplier invoice
entry.content: Are there any ways to park but not post supplier invoice in the app "create supplier invoice" and "supplier invoice list"?

entry.title: Is it possible to edit but not post supplier invoice in SAP public cloud?
entry.content: Are there any ways to edit the supplier invoice but not post in the app "Supplier invoice list"?

entry.title: Project-WBS Element（Change functional area after project release)
entry.content: When trying to edit the Functional Area of a project that has already been released in SAP Public Cloud, it is not possible to fill in the Functional Area. According to the SAP Note2935386 we found, it mentions Public Sector Management (PSM). However, this should not be applicable in Hong Kong. Is there any way to modify the Functional Area of a project?

entry.title: Multi Level Advanced Intercompany Sales information SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently deep diving in the advanced intercompany sales process in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud (202502). Our company has a complex intercompany structure and a must have requirement for (automated) multi level advanced intercompany sales as described in this SAP webinar: Advanced Intercompany Sales in SAP S/4HANA | SAP Community Call

However, looking at all the blogs, documentation and roadmap we can't find anything about the multi level intercompany process, just the single level. Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SA... - SAP Community

Is there any information on the multi level advanced intercompany sales process for S4 Public Cloud?

entry.title: Starter System - Outbound Communication not Possible
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Lately, I've been trying to send an XML to a specific endpoint when creating a Purchase Order. There is a process called 2EJ and an API, SAP_COM_0224, that covers this process.

However, when attempting to communicate with the Integration Suite, the message never seems to reach it. Even though S/4HANA reports the communication as successful, there's no error message and nothing is received on the other end.

Is the S/4HANA Public Cloud Starter System capable of performing outbound communication at all?

Kind regards,
Philipp

entry.title: Purchase Order creation directly from Sales Document
entry.content:
Hello there dear community, 

 

In sap s/4 hana public cloud I would like to create a purchase order directly from a sales order 1:1. Ideally, the purchase order also has a reference to the sales order. Is this possible in s/4 hana public cloud?

Stock should be ignored in the Process. 

kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: Need CDS view for customer Project Actual cost and Billed & Unbilled information in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm creating a CDS view for the customer project overview.

I need CDS view information to link the fields mentioned below. Some of these fields are available in the CUBE-related CDS view, but I couldn't use them in the "Custom CDS View" app.

Field Name
1. Actual Effort (Hours)
2. Actual Cost
3. Billed
4. Unbilled
5. Billing Method

Thanks & Regards,
Vignesh T

entry.title: Setup Fund Management in SAP Public Cloud Grow Step by Step
entry.content:
Helloo Expert,

i need some help to implement SAP FM in Public Cloud Grow,

As previously we are using ECC then migrate to SAP Public Cloud Grow,

please help guide me how to setup the process if there any different treatement..

during the implementation  i cannot find the information that relate.

what should i check first to start setup ?

 

Please your help will really appreciated.

Thank You

entry.title: Unable to execute Goods Issue due to Credit Card Authorization
entry.content:
• In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, when executing goods issue for a sales order with multiple delivery plants, a credit block error is encountered.
  • WHY does the credit card authorization 'expires' or becomes unusable after it has been partially billed?
  • How to re-authorize the orders?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration key date need to change
entry.content:
Hi Team,


We are not able to change the Migration Key date to from 12/31/DIGITS to 31/03/DIGITS, could you please do form your end


app name: Define Settings for Legacy Data Transfer


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Print relevant flag in a class not considered in Production Order printout, still showing all chars
entry.content:
Variant class is set Maintained unchecked print relevant indicator, still production order printouts showing unchecked

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registration Number
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When creating a sales order, my client wants that the taxe applicated should be the one of the sold-to party and not the ship to party if they are different. 

I updated the activity "Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registration Number" by adding the letter A for the sales organization. I also read the sap note 872449.

I did my test with an italian customer which has a french ship to party. The tax applicated is the one of the french partner and not the italian despite the update of the activity. 

How can I make the tax determination be the one of the sold to party ? 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to extract MBC Bank Statement file data from SAP S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we extract the Bank statements received into SAP S4 HANA Public cloud system from Bank via MBC connectivity . and send the same bank statements in CAMT.053 format to another external system?

 

Is this possible on especially on SAP S4 HANA public cloud system?

Please share the related blogs or articles.

SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition connector for SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity

entry.title: Service Quotation in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good afternoon

Please your help.

Is there an application that can be used to make a flexible analyse of the service quotations?

Where it shows the service order to which is link and the equipment.

#SAPS4HANACLOUDPUBLICEDITION

#SERVICE QUOTATION

#FLEXIBLEANALYSIS

entry.title: PayPal Payment Button with SAP Build Workzone & S/4HANA Public Cloud via PayPal Braintree
entry.content:
We’ve developed a custom sales platform using SAP Build Workzone, integrated with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and are in the process of implementing PayPal as a payment method.

We are currently using PayPal Braintree as our payment service provider (PSP), and the integration requires the use of the PayPal JavaScript SDK – https://developer.paypal.com/sdk/js/ – to render the PayPal payment button on the front end.

We’re encountering issues embedding/loading this PayPal JavaScript SDK within the Workzone environment. Anyone know of a workaround or how to load a JavaScript library on SAP Build?

The ultimate goal is: the user should be able to see the PayPal payment button on Checkout screen, and on click, it should trigger a new page to sign into their PayPal account and load the checkout details i.e. total price and allow them to choose and submit payment.

entry.title: Optional Sandbox system starter price
entry.content:
Hello, we use SAP S4H Public cloud edition 3SL. We are already in the Production tenant and the starter system was decommissioned after 30 days. We however need the starter environment again. 

I found that there is an option to subscribe to the optional Sandbox system for a fee. Could you please guide me on how to do it? And where can I find the fee amount? 

Many thanks

entry.title: How to know if the element is an OData entity
entry.content:
Dear community,

Is there any way to confirm if the field is accessible with the OData APIs and, if it is, which OData API service to use to access it?

For example, how do you know whether this field "Goods Issue Date" is available for some OData API service?

Also, how do you find an accessible API to the field?

I would appereciate any small information on this!

Thanks&Regards,

entry.title: How do I make the Line Item Text field reportable?
entry.content:
how do I make the Line Item Text field of sales order reportable in our custom dispatch report?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Feasibility of Assigning Different Smart Forms to the Same Billing Type for Different Sales Areas
entry.content: We are currently using SAP Public Cloud and have a requirement to assign different smart forms to the same billing type for different sales areas. I would like to know if this is feasible within the SAP Public Cloud environment.
